title: Keepers of the Stones II: Dark Stones
description: This add-on introduces dark stones that are empowered by the same dark forces as the Darkness Stone.
body:
Keepers of the Stones II: Dark Stones is an add-on for the Keepers of the Stones II mod that expands gameplay with four new dark stones whose power is drawn from the darkness itself: Thirst, Chaos, Horror, and Filth.

To obtain one of these stones, you must defeat the Cursed Keeper. After defeating the Cursed Guardian, you must die in the Cursed Forest without choosing any of the stones from his box.  As a result, you will receive one of the dark stones randomly.
